case_title: BWF FORGE TL PROPERTIES OWNER LLC VS. CLARE CATHERINE WYLIE ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BWF FORGE TL PROPERTIES OWNER LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WYLIE, CLARE CATHERINE DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 361 TURK STREET #416 SAN FRANCISCO, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY. CA 94102, ** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 210046932)
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 210046932) AS TO DEFENDANT WYLIE, CLARE CATHERINE DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BWF FORGE TL PROPERTIES OWNER LLC AS TO DEFENDANT WYLIE, CLARE CATHERINE DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE IS $78.24 PER DAY. (TRANSACTION ID # 210046932) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BWF FORGE TL PROPERTIES OWNER LLC

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210046932), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BWF FORGE TL PROPERTIES OWNER LLC SERVED AUG-13-2023, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE AUG-13-2023 AS TO DEFENDANT WYLIE, CLARE CATHERINE
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT WYLIE, CLARE CATHERINE
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT WYLIE, CLARE CATHERINE

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210046932), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BWF FORGE TL PROPERTIES OWNER LLC SERVED AUG-13-2023, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE
